calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-20-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Gusty Stambaugh, Appellant/Defendant, appearing on his own behalf with his witness Jonathan Patterson;
Abdelrahman Elsabagh, Respondent/Plaintiff, appearing on his own behalf;

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn.

Abdelrahman Elsabagh testifies on his own behalf.

The Court reviews and returns pictures presented by the Respondent/Plaintiff which shows condition of the rented room.

Gusty Stambaugh, Appellant/Defendant testifies on his own behalf.

The Court reviews and returns pictures presented by the appellant/defendant of a desk that was disposed of by respondent/appellant, pictures of the condition of refrigerator with spoiled food and its condition before and after it was cleaned.

Witness Jonathan Patterson testifies on behalf of appellant/defendant Gusty Stambaugh.

Appellant/Defendant examines witness Jonathan Patterson.

Respondent/plaintiff, Abdelrahman Elsabagh cross examines witness Jonathan Patterson.

Gusty Stambaugh, Appellant/Defendant address with the Court issues on his Counter Claim.

Respondent/plaintiff, Abdelrahman Elsabagh reponds.

Gusty Stambaugh, Appellant/Defendant responds.

Gusty Stambaugh, Appellant/Defendant presents to the Court and the Respondent/Plaintiff a written declaration and is returned by the Court to the appellant.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger R. Rubin, Clerk: William Trupek, not reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-25-2018 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-25-2018 Judgment Entered
